title: euphrasia glabrescens
intro: Euphrasia glabrescens, also known as the rough eyebright, is a type of flowering plant in the gentian family that is commonly found in mountainous regions of Europe. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are often used to treat eye infections and other eye-related issues. The health benefits of Euphrasia glabrescens include its ability to reduce swelling and promote healing in the eyes, as well as its potential to alleviate symptoms of conjunctivitis and other eye irritations. Euphrasia glabrescens can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used as natural remedies for eye health issues.
